programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: Officers stop a father and son packing loads of ammo, but can't find the gun. Meanwhile, the Vessel Search Unit find a suspect sailor on a US tug.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: Officers suspect an IT consultant has arrived for more than just a holiday  a surfer returns from Southeast Asia with a strange souvenir.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: A Korean bride-to-be tries to enter Canada as a tourist  the Marine Enforcement Team tackles a massive Japanese freighter carrying an illegal passenger.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: An American's trip to Alaska heads south  officers suspect a convicted drug dealer is taking his business north  a ship containing weapons is searched.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: A currency dog sniffs out thousands in undeclared cash  an aspiring actor can't keep track of the plot  officers arrest a wanted burglar.
